emails.subject: Energy & Power Risk Management Glossary
emails.body: Energy Power Risk Management Glossary Hi Tana, A little birdie tells me that you have a supply of the Energy Power Risk Management Glossary booklets. Am I getting close? I've found it to be very helpful, and I think it would help one of our new lawyers, Carlos Sole. Could I get a copy for him? Any other good power references? Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Re: Energy & Power Risk Management Glossary
emails.body: Re: Energy Power Risk Management Glossary Stephanie Panus has a few extra copies at her Desk. Kay Mann@ENRON 02/13/2001 04:03 PM
